transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Tell me your work and move-in date.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a Product Manager, my partner Sophie works in marketing. We’re looking to move in next month. When would be a good time to view the flat?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Specify your exact move-in date and request a viewing time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: We’re aiming to move in around the 1st of next month. Would it be possible to arrange a viewing sometime this week?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Give me a specific day and time for the viewing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: How about Thursday afternoon, say around 3pm? Would that work for you?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: State your employment, move date, and confirm the viewing time without questions to get the number.
